title: French Vegetarian Quiche
description: A delicious and easy-to-make quiche perfect for a French-inspired brunch or dinner. This recipe is a great option for vegetarians and can be customized with your favorite fillings.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough and place it in a 9-inch tart pan.
In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onion until softened.
Add the fresh spinach and cook until wilted.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the coconut milk and feta cheese.
Pour the milk mixture over the cooked onion and spinach mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Pour the mixture into the pastry-lined tart pan.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
